page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Package for performing and optimising genomic prediction using machine learning. Genomic prediction attempts to predict a phenotypic value given an individuals genetic data and other context.

This package provides a range of models, feature selection methods, and data transformers following the scikit-learn API tailored specifically for genomic prediction.
